title: cydonia maulei
intro: Cydonia maulei, also known as the Chilean quince, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cydonia maulei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cydonia maulei include teas, infusions, and jams made from its flowers and fruits, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
